title: Tokyo Ghoul Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/sFbv6rt.png)** **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Tokyo Ghoul" . Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.** **The palette that I choose is light blue & Black & Yellow but maybe in the future.** **If you guys want other colors like Red & white or any colors else.** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Images** **Hud** **![](https://i.imgur.com/bUqMCN9.png)** **Settings** **![](https://i.imgur.com/irEkfMA.png)** **Chest** **![](https://i.imgur.com/4U5UAeA.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/Z9FMgRp.png)** **Brewing Stand** **![](https://i.imgur.com/Df2WKNA.png)** **Crafting Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/4bVtckk.png)** **Furnace** **![](https://i.imgur.com/wwN8eEZ.png)** **Shulker Box** **![](https://i.imgur.com/s5ChyFF.png)** **Cartography Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/0H09S3a.png)** **Beacon** **![](https://i.imgur.com/N4FefkQ.png)** **Loom** **![](https://i.imgur.com/RennAhn.png)** **Villager Trading Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/wZ6LJNq.png)** **Creative Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/C6GfG8s.png)** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
